meaning: adj.联合的,同盟的,与...同属一系v.联合
examples: Allied troops captured over 300 enemy soldiers.
MacArthur was Supreme Commander for the allied powers in the Pacific.
It was clear that one massive Allied offensive would overwhelm the weakened enemy.
This allied and regional reluctance to get involved in Syria poses a problem for the Obama administration.
Allied Nevada Gold Corp shares are currently trading down about 4.9% on the day.
